response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD), and some high-throughput systems exposure, but the profile does not match a Principal IC6 growth/experimentation role. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated multi-workstream technical leadership at the scope this level requires.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus open-source and AI-agent tooling experience
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience
No evidence of principal-level scope: architecting systems used across multiple teams or leading multi-workstream initiatives
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background relative to the role's core focus

key_factors.factor: Scope gap between senior IC work and Principal IC6 expectations
Solid engineering fundamentals and years of experience
